cta.headline: Ready to Refresh Your Space?

servicesPage.intro: From interior makeovers to exterior transformations, Trust Painting Inc. offers comprehensive painting services in Dallas. Our skilled team uses premium products and proven techniques to deliver beautiful, long-lasting results.

services.title: Interior Painting
services.shortDescription: Transform your indoor spaces with precision and care.
services.longDescription: Our interior painting service revitalizes any room with smooth, even coats and meticulous attention to detail. We protect your floors and furniture, and ensure a clean, enjoyable experience.

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss colors, sheens, and surfaces to create a plan.

process.title: Preparation
process.description: We move furniture, tape edges, and prime surfaces for best adhesion.

process.title: Painting & Cleanup
process.description: Our team paints with precision and leaves your space spotless.

faqs.question: How long does interior painting take?
faqs.answer: Most rooms take 1-2 days, depending on size and complexity.

faqs.question: What paint brands do you use?
faqs.answer: We use premium brands like Sherwin-Williams and Benjamin Moore for quality and durability.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.shortDescription: Protect and beautify your home's exterior.
services.longDescription: Our exterior painting service includes thorough surface preparation, pressure washing, and application of weather-resistant paints. We enhance curb appeal and protect against the elements.
benefits: Boosts curb appeal and property value
Protects against sun, rain, and wind

process.title: Inspection & Prep
process.description: We assess surfaces, power wash, and repair any damage.

process.title: Priming & Caulking
process.description: We prime bare wood and seal gaps for a smooth base.

process.title: Painting
process.description: We apply two coats of premium exterior paint for even coverage.

faqs.question: How often should I repaint my home's exterior?
faqs.answer: Every 5-7 years, depending on climate and paint quality.

faqs.question: Do you work in winter?
faqs.answer: Yes, as long as temperatures are above 35°F, we can paint exterior surfaces.

services.title: Commercial Painting
services.shortDescription: Professional painting for businesses and offices.
services.longDescription: We provide efficient, low-disruption painting for commercial properties. Our team works around your schedule to deliver high-quality results that enhance your brand image.

process.title: Project Planning
process.description: We coordinate with you to schedule work during off-hours.

process.title: Surface Preparation
process.description: We prep walls, trim, and ceilings for a flawless finish.

process.title: Application & Inspection
process.description: Our crew paints efficiently and we conduct a final walkthrough.

faqs.question: Do you offer after-hours painting?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We work evenings and weekends to avoid business disruption.

faqs.question: What types of commercial properties do you paint?
faqs.answer: Offices, retail stores, restaurants, warehouses, and more.

services.title: Cabinet Painting
services.shortDescription: Give your cabinets a fresh, modern look.
services.longDescription: Transform your kitchen or bathroom with cabinet painting. We use specialized techniques and durable paints to achieve a factory-like finish without the cost of replacement.
benefits: Custom color options to match your style

process.title: Removal & Cleaning
process.description: We remove doors and hardware, then clean all surfaces.

process.title: Sanding & Priming
process.description: We sand and apply a high-adhesion primer.

process.title: Spraying & Reassembly
process.description: We spray paint for a smooth finish, then reinstall doors and hardware.

faqs.question: How long does cabinet painting take?
faqs.answer: Typically 3-5 days, depending on cabinet size and complexity.

faqs.question: Can you match existing colors?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can color match to blend with your decor.

about.headline: Dallas's Trusted Painting Experts
about.mission: To deliver exceptional painting services that exceed expectations, with honesty, quality, and professionalism at every step.
story: Trust Painting Inc. was founded on the belief that every home and business deserves a beautiful, lasting finish. With over a decade of experience in the Dallas area, our team has built a reputation for reliability, craftsmanship, and customer satisfaction.

From small touch-ups to large-scale projects, we treat every job with the same dedication. Our painters are trained, insured, and passionate about their work. We're proud to be a local business serving our neighbors with pride.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We never compromise on materials or workmanship.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest pricing, clear communication, and reliable service.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your property with the utmost care and cleanliness.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: Proudly serving Dallas and supporting our local economy.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Quote Today
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Call or fill out our form.
